Privacy Policy

CineFlux App - Film Production Platform

1. Information We Collect

When you sign in with Google, we collect your email, name, and profile picture.

2. How We Use Your Information

To authenticate access, manage projects, and enable Google Drive integration.

3. Google Drive Access

We access your Google Drive to create project folders and manage production documents.

4. Contact

For privacy concerns: mariaraujo29@gmail.com

Last updated: May 2, 2026
